mode.description: Trading mode. 'rule_based' uses the expression engine (default). 'discretionary' lets you execute trades directly via the 'trade' action.

trade.description: Discretionary trade to execute immediately. Only used when action is 'trade'.

tp_pct.description: Take profit as a percentage of entry price (0.1-5.0).

sl_pct.description: Stop loss as a percentage of entry price (0.1-3.0).

sizing_fraction.description: Position size as a percentage of equity (1-100).

policy.description: Rule-based policy to use. 'expression' uses directional entry/exit expressions; 'ensemble' runs multiple expression members.

policy_params.description: Exact params for the chosen policy (e.g. {"fast_period": 10, "slow_period": 30}).

ensemble_members.description: Only used when policy is 'ensemble'. Array of {type, params} objects.

indicators.description: Indicators to compute, format: NAME_PERIOD (e.g. SMA_20, RSI_14, ATR_14).

tp_pct.description: Take profit as a percentage of entry price (0.1-5.0).

sl_pct.description: Stop loss as a percentage of entry price (0.1-3.0).

sizing_fraction.description: Position size as a percentage of equity (1-20).

next_check_seconds.description: How many seconds until the next setup check. 60-3600. Null uses the default poll interval.

chat_message.description: Optional message to send to the competition chat.

overrides.description: LEGACY: Config fields to deep-merge into the runtime YAML. Prefer the flat fields above.

restart_runtime.description: Whether the runtime process needs to restart for changes to take effect.
